__fixture__.name: entry_sheet_clone_remote_target
__fixture__.scenario: Paired with entry_row_clone_remote_repository_start_center.json. The clone activation emits one open_flow_sheet_record (open_flow_sheet_class = clone_remote_target, sheet_surface_class = full_sheet). The sheet exposes target_type (remote_repository), policy_restrictions (auth required, authority_delta = revalidates), result_mode (resolved single mode = clone_then_review), destination_disposition_disclosure (write_to_labelled_staging, no_collision), side_effect_disclosure (toolchain_detect_only, network_dependent, rollback_checkpoint_retained, no_bypass_available), profile_default_disclosure (default_profile, override_affordance = true), trust_posture, and fallback. No bytes land outside labelled staging before commit. Demonstrates §5.1 clone_remote_target, §5.2 destination + side-effect axes, §5.3 invariants 1, 2, 3, 4.

target_type_disclosure.summary: Private remote repository. OAuth handle resolved before commit.

policy_restrictions_disclosure.summary: Cloning revalidates authority but does not widen it. Trust is evaluated when the cloned root opens.

result_mode_disclosure.summary: Cloned bytes land in labelled staging; review opens before promotion to a durable workspace.

destination_disposition_disclosure.summary: Clone writes to labelled staging only. Promotion to durable workspace requires explicit user review.

side_effect_disclosure.summary: Network required. No setup actions run; toolchain is detected but not installed.

profile_default_disclosure.summary: Clones use the deployment default profile. Override available before commit.

trust_posture_disclosure.summary: Cloning never grants trust. The trust prompt fires when the clone is opened, not when bytes land.

fallback_disclosure.summary: Cancel rolls back staging. Inspect-only opens the cloned tree without admitting trust.

presentation_subtitle: Clone never grants trust. Bytes land in labelled staging until you review.
